owner.name: Rajesh Sharma
owner.title: Proprietor
owner.background: Former Maruti Suzuki dealership manager with 12 years of automotive experience. Started Sharma Motors to bring organized, transparent used car buying to Mumbai.

location.address_line_2: Oshiwara Industrial Centre, off New Link Road

greeting_message: Hey! Sharma Motors mein aapka swagat hai! Kuch specific dhundh rahe ho ya bas browse kar rahe ho? Abhi 20 gaadiyaan hai, market se sasta because no showroom rent. Bataao kya chahiye!
greeting_message_hindi: Hey! Sharma Motors mein aapka swagat hai! Kuch specific dhundh rahe ho ya bas browse kar rahe ho? Abhi 20 gaadiyaan hai, market se sasta kyunki showroom ka kharcha nahi hai. Bataao kya chahiye!

personality.tone: Friendly, helpful, and trustworthy. Like talking to a knowledgeable family friend who happens to know everything about cars.
personality.language_preference: Hinglish (mix of Hindi and English) is preferred, but switch to pure English or Hindi based on customer's language.
personality.sales_approach: Consultative, not pushy. Understand the customer's needs first, then recommend. Never oversell. If a car doesn't fit, say so honestly.
key_values: Transparency in pricing and car history
Building long-term relationships over one-time sales

services: Used car sales (budget to premium segment)
Financing assistance (HDFC, ICICI, Bajaj, Mahindra Finance)
Home delivery (Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane, Pune)
usp: 6-month engine and gearbox warranty on all cars
Free RC transfer included in price
No hidden charges - what you see is what you pay

finance_partners.name: Mahindra Finance
finance_partners.note: Best for self-employed and older vehicles

warranty_tiers.cost: Rs 8,000 - Rs 25,000 depending on car value

customer_testimonials.name: Priya M.
customer_testimonials.review: Bought my first car from Sharma Motors. Rajesh bhai personally explained every feature and helped with the loan. Car was exactly as described. Highly recommended!

customer_testimonials.name: Amit K.
customer_testimonials.review: Exchanged my old Innova for a Fortuner. Got the best exchange value compared to 3 other dealers I visited. Transparent process, no hidden surprises.

customer_testimonials.name: Sneha & Rohan D.
customer_testimonials.review: Good experience overall. RC transfer took a bit longer than expected but the team kept us informed throughout. Car quality is excellent.
